goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PSFO/PSU (*Oc1ccc(C(C)(C)c2ccc(Oc3ccc(S(=O)(=O)c4ccc(*)cc4)cc3)cc2)cc1)
assumptions: SMILES resolves to PSU (Udel): isopropylidene bridge C(C)(C) between aryl ether and aryl sulfone => bisphenol-A polysulfone. exp Tg=463 K, RT density ~1.24-1.25 g/cm3, K_T 4.0-5.5 GPa.
PSFO is a multi-member class (exp Tg dict {PSU:463, PES:493, PPSU:493}); member disambiguated by SMILES, not by class median.

PCFF Class II covers aryl-SO2-aryl + aryl ether torsions by analogy (no class-specific PCFF MD Tg/density validation paper for polysulfones); MD Tg expected ~540-580 K (overprediction) so sweep tops at 750 K.
Glassy regime (exp Tg 463 >> 300 K): mechanical track = Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K primary, 3-direction deform fallback; Born+NVT removed (PCFF+PPPM virial inflation).
DP=25, nchain=8 ~ 1 M_e for PSU (MW~11,050): adequate for Tg, short of entanglement plateau for K -> flag K offset.

uncertainties.name: ff_transferability
uncertainties.note: No class-specific PCFF MD Tg/density validation paper for polysulfones. PCFF Class II covers aryl-SO2-aryl + aryl ether by analogy (PC Tg 417 vs exp 422 K). Expect MD Tg overprediction ~540-580 K and density ~-4% vs exp (PSU1+PSU2 confirmed systematic PCFF bias). Bulk modulus K is the headline PASS for this class.

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.note: hardware_policy.values_are_benchmarked=false; directional_probe.measured_on (A800 40GB / 32 cores) does not match live host (RTX 6000 24GB / 18 cores), and the ~11,400-atom cell is ~3.8x the 3020-atom pcff benchmark cell (outside [0.5x,2x]). Keeping the by_forcefield.pcff default (kokkos/mpi=1/1 GPU); probe is PLANNED only, not executed.

evidence.claim: PCFF (Class II) via EMC. Sun1994 (CFF93/PCFF) is the FF origin; PCFF Class II cross terms cover aryl-SO2-aryl sulfone and aryl ether torsions by analogy. No class-specific PCFF MD Tg/density validation paper for polysulfones yet (ROADMAP Track G).
PCFF supporting validation for polar aromatic backbones

alternatives.rejected_because: Tg error >45% for PMMA; weaker Class I cross-term coverage for aromatic sulfone.
OPLS sulfone charges (~S +1.3 / O -0.55) differ fundamentally from PCFF native bond-increment values (S ~+0.08 / sulfone O ~-0.11); mixing would be inconsistent and EMC routes PSFO to PCFF.

evidence.claim: PCFF embeds charges via bond-increment rules; no separate QM/Gasteiger pass. Sulfone S ~+0.08 e and sulfone O (o=) ~-0.11 e per S-O bond are native PCFF values (NOT OPLS/QM magnitudes).
VERIFY at build: a charge of exactly 0.0000 on S or sulfone O indicates a MISSING frc increment, not a small value. Confirm so2/o_2s atom types are assigned in EMC PCFF output before run.

alternatives.rejected_because: inconsistent with PCFF bond-increment parameterization; would double-count or mismatch the FF-native electrostatics.

evidence.claim: Backbone carries sulfone S + 2 sulfone O + ether O, all bond-increment charged, plus aromatic ring charges. Even with small per-atom magnitudes the charges accumulate along a rigid aromatic chain -> long-range Coulomb required. PPPM mandatory; lj/cut only for apolar UA backbones.

alternatives.rejected_because: neglecting long-range Coulomb biases density/Tg by 5-20% for polar heteroatom backbones; only valid for pure C/H.

evidence.claim: DP=25 clears the Fox-Flory floor (decision_policy requires DP>=20 for Tg/bulk_modulus). MW~11,050 g/mol ~ 1 M_e for PSU; adequate for Tg. nchain=8 -> ~11,400 all-atom in the cell (~57 atoms/monomer x 200 monomers).

PSU is rigid-aromatic; ~1 M_e is short of the entanglement plateau, so glassy K may be biased slightly high (finite-MW). Flag K as offset; bulk modulus PASS is still the headline result for this class.

alternatives.rejected_because: at the Fox-Flory hard floor; DP=25 gives a safer Tg plateau margin within the same GPU budget.

evidence.claim: Aromatic main chain: C(t)/C-infinity is undefined via atom-type backbone detection (ct_gate_reliable=false). Gate on density plateau within range + homogeneity CV<0.25 + P2<0.10 + energy drift/SEM; melt self-diffusion metrics advisory only. 15 ns equil + 8 anneal cycles substitute for unattainable melt self-diffusion.

decisions.choice: multirate [25,50,100] K/ns, bilinear hyperbola, sweep 250-750 K @ 20 K step

evidence.claim: At dt=1 fs and T_step=20 K, rates [25,50,100] K/ns give 800/400/200 ps per T-hold, all above the steps-per-T floor (2,000,000 steps configured). Sweep 250-750 K brackets exp 463 K AND expected MD Tg 540-580 K. Slowest rate (25 K/ns) is the DSC-convention reported Tg.

[25,50,100] is the polymer_rules.json default ladder for PSFO. PSFO is rigid-aromatic, but the r40-only degeneracy warning applies at r400 (50 ps/T); the fastest rate here (r100 = 200 ps/T) is well clear of that artifact. Prior PSU runs used faster ladders ([40,160,640]/[40,160,400]) and one tripped the slope gate at the high rate; this slower default reduces that risk, and the slope-gate hard-stop remains downstream as the safety net.

decisions.choice: glassy: Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (primary), 3-direction deform (fallback)

evidence.claim: PSU exp Tg 463 K >> 300 K -> glassy at the 300 K mechanical-track temperature. Glassy K from Murnaghan EOS fit to NPT volume vs pressure at 300 K on the cooled npt_prod300 cell; 3-dir uniaxial deform as fallback (isotropy_delta>=20% = hard FAIL). Born+NVT removed (PCFF+PPPM virial inflates K_Born 8-15x).
Exp K_T (isothermal) 4.0-5.5 GPa for glassy PSU at 25 C; Mark 2007 Table 7.6 Tait params (b0=4323 bar, b1=0.00154) give K_T~4.65 GPa at 25 C.

alternatives.rejected_because: REMOVED 2026-06-21: PCFF+PPPM virial inflates K_Born 8-15x and Var(P) ~10^7x; failed 3/3 runs, no run-length fix.

evidence.claim: FF family = pcff -> by_forcefield.pcff default (kokkos full-offload, mpi=1, 1 GPU/run): kspace is GPU-resident so the 'never mpi=1' GPU-package rule does not apply. Estimated cell ~11,400 all-atom (dp25 x nchain8 x ~57 atoms/monomer), >10k atoms.

directional_probe is a HINT only: values_are_benchmarked=false, measured_on=A800 40GB/32 cores does NOT match live RTX 6000 24GB/18 cores, and 11.4k atoms is ~3.8x the 3020-atom pcff bench cell (outside [0.5x,2x]). recommended_by_ff.pcff.gpu=1 with no benchmark support for >10k -> no multi-GPU pin. Keep the FF-family default; choice == default so decided_params stays hardware-free.
Task pins GPU id 3, MPI=1, 1 CPU core, 32 GB, 48 h -> consistent with the kokkos/mpi=1/1-GPU default. PPPM-heavy KOKKOS run saturates one GPU (do NOT pack >1 run/GPU).

alternatives.rejected_because: multi-GPU pin requires BOTH >10k cell AND benchmark support on a matching host; neither host-match nor a clean benchmark exists -> conservative gate keeps 1 GPU.

findings: APPROVED. Gate verified independently: PSFO confidence=medium -> reasoned mode matches plan_mode. All evidence_required decisions (D-01/D-03/D-07) carry source_doi/citation+alternatives; D-07 multi-member hard-require satisfied (SMILES isopropylidene C(C)(C) bridge -> PSU/Udel, exp Tg=463 pinned, not PES/PPSU). Tg floor recomputed independently: [25,50,100] K/ns -> 800/400/200 ps per T-hold, all >=200 ps floor (r100 exactly at floor). D-08 hardware = by_forcefield.pcff default (kokkos/mpi=1/1 GPU), decided_params hardware-free -> policy-derived, no finding. Stage schema + track_map all valid.

ADVISORY D-07: PSFO has no bm_pressures_atm in polymer_rules, so the Murnaghan worker defaults to ~+/-1000 atm, likely too narrow for stiff glassy PSU (exp K 4.0-5.5 GPa; cf. PEST B0' runaway at +/-1000). Expect possible B0' outside [4,20] -> deform 3-dir fallback (already in planned_stages, so K remains obtainable). NOT plan-fixable: gen_prompt murnaghan reads cls.bm_pressures_atm from polymer_rules, not decided_params -> polymer_rules PSFO needs bm_pressures_atm ~ [-5000..5000]. Captured to memory.

ADVISORY D-06: top rate 100 K/ns = 200 ps/T exceeds the rigid-aromatic [40,80] K/ns recommendation (memory: PKTN+PSFO degeneracy). Plan's argument is sound (200 ps/T well clear of the 50 ps/T artifact threshold; slowest r25/r50 safe; slope-gate hard-stop downstream). Not blocking; polymer_rules PSFO tg_rates curation worth revisiting. Captured to memory.

ADVISORY D-05: plan cites require_glassy advisory gating, but the decision_policy require_glassy exemption is keyed on DP>=30 and this cell is DP=25. Substance is correct via PSFO._ct_note (ct_gate_reliable=false -> C(t) non-binding for aromatics), the proper DP-independent basis. decision_policy gap: require_glassy should also key on ct_gate_reliable=false, not DP>=30 alone. Captured to memory.
